name: NumberFormatter

files.content:
export { NumberFormatter } from './NumberFormatter';
export type { NumberFormatterFactory, NumberFormatterProps } from './NumberFormatter';

visual_summary: The NumberFormatter component displays numbers in a formatted way. A developer would use this to display numbers with different formats such as currency, percentage etc. It can be applied to various data types to make them more readable.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: NumberFormatter
Description: The NumberFormatter component displays numbers in a formatted way. A developer would use this to display numbers with different formats such as currency, percentage etc. It can be applied to various data types to make them more readable.
Style: default, filled
Interactions: disabled
Tags: formatter, number, format

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
